Columns.Name: 工事見積_見積手配待ち件数
工事見積_見積手配保留件数
工事見積_設計待ち件数
工事見積_見積催促中件数
工事見積_設計審査中件数
工事見積_修正依頼中件数
工事見積_審査保留件数
工事見積_審査完了件数
工事見積_受注確定待ち件数
工事見積_リマインド予定件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_見積手配待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.estimate_arrange_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_見積手配保留件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.design_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_設計待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.estimate_reminder_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_見積催促中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.design_examination_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_設計審査中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.requesting_correction_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_修正依頼中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.pending_review_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_審査保留件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.examination_complete_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_審査完了件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (c.order_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_受注確定待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN ((c.design_wait_flg = 1) AND (b.active_flg = 1) AND (d.complete_flg = 0) AND (a.estimate_reminder_flg = 1) AND (a.estimate_reminder_date = CURRENT_DATE)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事見積_リマインド予定件数"
   FROM (((t_object_construction_estimate a
     JOIN t_object_order b ON ((a.object_order_id = b.object_order_id)))
     JOIN m_construction_estimate_status c ON ((a.construction_estimate_status_id = c.construction_estimate_status_id)))
     JOIN m_order_status d ON ((b.order_status_id = d.order_status_id)))
  WHERE ((b.active_flg = 1) AND ((c.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) OR (c.estimate_arrange_pending_flg = 1) OR (c.design_wait_flg = 1) OR (c.estimate_reminder_flg = 1) OR (c.design_examination_flg = 1) OR (c.requesting_correction_flg = 1) OR (c.pending_review_flg = 1) OR (c.examination_complete_flg = 1) OR (c.order_wait_flg = 1)));
